basic_details.job_title: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Director General of Foreign Trade Hyderabad (DGFT)
basic_details.short_information: Director General of Foreign Trade Hyderabad (DGFT) Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website of DGFT. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 10-06-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Economics from a recognized University - Min 65%, Masters in Business Administration from a recognized University - Min 65%, B Tech/BE/MCA from a recognized University - Min 65%, Masters in Commerce from a recognized University - Min 65%
qualification.details: Masters in Economics from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. Masters in Business Administration from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. B.Tech/B.E./MCA from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. Masters in Commerce from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.director_general_of_foreign_trade_hydera: Masters in Economics from a recognized University - Min 65%, Masters in Business Administration from a recognized University - Min 65%, B Tech/BE/MCA from a recognized University - Min 65%, Masters in Commerce from a recognized University - Min 65%

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DGFT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DGFT Young Professional Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Masters in Economics from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. Masters in Business Administration from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. B.Tech/B.E./MCA from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. Masters in Commerce from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks.

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 10-06-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Young Professional posts at DGFT Hyderabad is 03-07-2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Young Professional position in the Director General of Foreign Trade Hyderabad recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Economics, Business Administration, or Commerce, or a B.Tech/B.E./MCA from a recognized university with at least 65% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 35 years, as of 10-06-2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional role will be offered a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional posts will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The Young Professional positions are on a contractual basis. This is a temporary engagement.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DGFT Hyderabad office located?
faq.answer: The DGFT Hyderabad office is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with a pincode of 500080.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Telangana apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. However, it is always best to check the detailed official notification for any specific state-wise eligibility criteria.
